title: CraftsWork

### Issues/requests/Ideas
> **_X_ is not working!:**\
Report it to my [Discord](https://discord.gg/XK6rgmTNv3) or [Github](https://github.com/aurora-1-2-3/CraftsWork/issues)

>**Wow great pack, but I would like to....!:**\
>If you have any requests 
>suggest them in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/XK6rgmTNv3) or [Github](https://github.com/aurora-1-2-3/CraftsWork/issues)

>**Omg, I just got an amazing idea!:**\
suggest the idea in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/XK6rgmTNv3) or [Github](https://github.com/aurora-1-2-3/CraftsWork/issues)

>**Using assets:**\
Sorry i do not allow usage of my assets
